2026-06-19T09:27:17.6568999Z git version 2.54.0
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6602158Z Copying '/home/runner/.gitconfig' to '/home/runner/work/_temp/20e56916-b56c-46b4-820c-957751f73b4a/.gitconfig'
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6611623Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/20e56916-b56c-46b4-820c-957751f73b4a' before making global git config changes
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6615099Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6617677Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/apm/apm
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6649124Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6655154Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6689548Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6927887Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6932592Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-06-19T09:27:17.6966069Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-06-19T09:27:17.7198445Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-06-19T09:27:17.7205123Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-06-19T09:27:17.7235310Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
